text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Heeeey, knock knock! What's up, Trainer? Let's
partyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer suddenly barges into my office.
Nice Nature and several others file in one after
the other behind her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the sudden intrusion, but we're all
getting together to throw a holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Would you like to join us?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It'd also be great if we could use your office while
we're at it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh oh, looks like your trainer's at a loss for words.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, the reason things came to this is because...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What?! Your family doesn't celebrate the holidays
together, Sato?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, we don't. Both Mother and Father are always
busy with work and charity events over the
holidays.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I attend the parties my family's clients invite us
to, and we hold a party for the entire Satono
Group as well, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We don't celebrate together as a family.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: For real? Not getting presents must suck!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do receive presents! Santa always visits
in the night and leaves gifts in my stocking!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've never had an intimate party at home like you
see in the movies, though, so I do wonder what
it's like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Then let's have one!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's a good suggestion. We may not be able to
invite your parents, but we could throw a party
together.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We do know a thing or two when it comes to cozy
little house parties, don't we? I say we have one!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Parrrrrtyyy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Since your parents can't make it, why don't
we invite your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser with the dope idea! Let's go now!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's the situation. So would you like to join us...
and also kindly allow us to use your office?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're really okay with it?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: In that case, let's begin putting up decorations.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whew... That should do it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is amazing! I had no idea handmade
decorations could be so gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm baaack! I bought us food and snacks!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ooh, chicken and pizza! ☆ Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Evening, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Kita?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I ran into Tannhauser by the school gates,
and she invited me over!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We'd love to have you with us! Come on in!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, these are all the same people
who organized the welcome party for us when we
were new students!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're right! How nostalgic!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aw... I can't believe how much all the wide-eyed
newbies have grown...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, we can take a trip down memory lane
later! Let's tuck in before the food gets cold!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Pizza, salad, chicken... squid jerky, stingray fin,
and vinegared kelp?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... So is this the standard fare people
have at house parties?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's not exactly standard, but I can't deny that we
always stock up on these kind of snacks at our
house over the winter holidays!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the shopkeepers gave me a bunch of
freebies. Looks like they threw in lots of different
snacks! Isn't that nice!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm out! Now it's down to either Kita or Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Maybe I should pick the rightmost
card...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Or maybe the left card is better...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm going with the one on the left!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, nooo! I won't let you take the left
card!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Give it up, Turbo. You're way too easy to read...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time passes in a flash, and we have a wonderful
holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black stay behind
to help clean up, and I see them off to their dorm
afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, today was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I always thought of the holidays as just another
busy time filled with work, to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. You did say you always have a
bunch of obligations at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It would be nice to invite my little
brother to a party like today's as well.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good idea! I'm sure he'd love it! Let's throw
another party next year!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Would you be open to joining us again next year
as well, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really? You promise?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's decided, then! You already have plans with
me, so don't you dare double-book yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make sure to write down my plans for a party
with Satono Diamond into to my otherwise empty
schedule for next year.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: All right. I'd say it's about time for some cake.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! I... I forgot to buy a cake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I pop out to buy some cake,
but all the nearby stores are sold out, so we have
to travel a bit farther for one.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: The winter illuminations sure are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've always wanted to walk through festive
streets like the ones in the movies.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that's not to say I dislike working or
helping at charity events with my parents.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I always learn a lot at those events, and I'm proud
to volunteer my time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's just, I've always yearned for a stereotypical
holiday experience...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But... everyone is waiting for us to bring a cake
back.
choice_data_list:
They've got plenty of snacks to keep them
busy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. There's no way they'll have
gotten through them all already!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's take our time and enjoy the scenery.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the streets dressed in seasonal
decorations almost makes it feel like we're in a
different country, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of a town I strolled through on a
trip abroad many years ago.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Someday... I'd like to walk along the streets in
another country with you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was quite forceful when I selected you as my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'd like to know what you really think
this time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Would you consider going overseas with me?
choice_data_list:
If that's what you'd like, I'd happily accompany
you.

If that's what you'd like, I'd happily accompany
you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear you say that! Here's to many
more happy days working together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's walk through the streets of an entirely
different country someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we stare out at the transformed and magical
town around us, Satono Diamond and I make a
promise for the not-so-distant future.
